scripts.test:all: npm run test:repo && npm run test:shared && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.mock:p0:start: docker rm -f asp-p0-neg-mock >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && docker run --name asp-p0-neg-mock -d -p 18001:8000 -v "$PWD/scripts/dev/p0-negative-mock.py:/app/mock.py:ro" python:3.12-alpine python /app/mock.py
scripts.mock:autogpt:start: docker rm -f asp-autogpt-mock >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && docker run --name asp-autogpt-mock -d -p 18000:8000 -v "$PWD/scripts/dev/autogpt-negative-mock.py:/app/mock.py:ro" python:3.12-alpine python /app/mock.py
